meta_title: Deep Dive Report — personal analysis across 6 systems
meta_desc: Birth chart, Human Design, Destiny Matrix. Only what's confirmed by your data. Personal decryption without templates.
hero_sub: Based on six systems: astrology, Human Design, Destiny Matrix. You read it — and you recognize yourself. Not a Zodiac sign. Yourself.
step1_desc: Date, time, and city of birth. If you have a ready HD calculation or birth chart, send it to increase accuracy.
step2_desc: 3 days of work with six systems. Every conclusion is verified by at least two independent sources.
step3_desc: PDF document: 12 sections, IR index, three specific tasks, and a 12-month guide. Ready for study.
sample_title: Simple Example: Choosing between realization and peace
sample_astro: Ascendant in Leo (desire for recognition) + Mars in 10th house (career).
sample_hd: Projector (waiting for invitation) + Ego center (will to succeed).
sample_quote: "...Conclusion: The pattern is confirmed. You have a huge resource for leadership, but your body blocks actions if you try to 'run ahead of the train' without recognition of your merits by others. Success comes only through an external request..."
sample_note: Fragment from a real report. Data changed for the example.
forwho_desc: They give many beautiful words but little understanding of what to do. You recognize yourself in the description, but there's no clarity on the next step.
card1: Know your HD type but don't understand how to apply it in real life
card2: See a pattern but don't know where it comes from or how to stop it
card3: Want a mechanism — not inspiration — that explains your specific actions
card4: Ready for an honest conversation: not just about talents but about shadow zones
card5: Want specific tasks, not general recommendations
card6: Understand why the same scenario repeats — in money, relationships, decisions
method_title: One system is a version. Multiple systems is a fact about you.
method_desc: Only what is confirmed by at least two systems gets into the report. Six sources look at the same thing.
sys1_detail: Basic psychological foundation. Shows your innate talents, way of processing information, and emotional reactions. This is what you lean on throughout your life.
sys2_detail: Mechanics of your interaction with the world. How to correctly spend energy without burning out and how to make decisions you can trust.
sys3_detail: Shows the main archetypes of your personality. We analyze 'tails' and tasks to understand which shadow scenarios hinder your growth in money and relationships.
sys4_desc: Where the pattern is from and where to grow
sys4_detail: The vector of your development. Shows habitual (but no longer effective) behavior models and new qualities that need to be developed to reach the next level.
sys5_detail: Hidden sabotage mechanisms. We break down why you choose strategies that lead to losses and how to turn these arcana into a resourceful state.
sys6_detail: Integration of all data through the prism of modern psychology. We explain not just 'what' is laid in you, but 'how' this mechanism works at the level of habits.
sys_hier_desc: If systems say different things, we follow the hierarchy: Natal Chart (base) → Human Design (mechanics) → Arcana (details).
ir_desc: IR (Integrator Rating) is an index of how much your current actions coincide with your natural design. This is your starting point.
ir_help: The higher the index, the less internal resistance and more results with the same efforts.
struct_desc: Click on a section to find out exactly what we analyze in it.
s1_d: How you think and make decisions
s1_detail: Deconstruction of your way of perceiving reality. You will understand why some tasks are easy while others cause a stupor.
s2_detail: We find the point where your desires clash with fears and show how to resolve this conflict.
s3_detail: What is confirmed by at least three systems. This is your inexhaustible resource on which success is built.
s4_detail: Development recommendations based on planetary cycles and your transits. What to start and what to leave behind.
s5_d: Where you lose energy and money
s5_detail: Drain mechanism: trigger — reaction — loss. We show how to break this chain.
s6_d: Numerical calculation of your current point
s6_detail: Detailed deconstruction of IR by 5 parameters: decisions, actions, money, partnership, vector.
s7_detail: Where the money lies specifically for you. Whether a team is needed, if it's worth taking risks, and what type of activity will bring the maximum.
s8_d: Your model of a resourceful union
s8_detail: Who you choose and why. How to build intimacy without losing yourself and your dignity.
s9_detail: What you need to feel safe and be truly happy at home.
s10_d: Action plan for the coming year
s10_detail: Specific focus points by months: when to hit the gas and when to step into the shadows.
s11_d: Influence of external cycles right now
s11_detail: Analysis of what lessons you are currently going through and how to use the current period to your benefit.
s12_detail: Practical exercises specifically selected for your personality structure to launch changes.
cr1_l: Description of sign, type, profile — each separately
cr1_r: Six systems speak of one thing — you see intersections
cr2_r: Each conclusion is confirmed by at least two sources
cr3_l: Talents listed — unclear what to do
cr3_r: Mechanism: not just what but why and how to stop it
cr4_l: Shadow zone softened or not mentioned
cr4_r: Shadow zones honestly and behaviorally — without diagnoses
cr5_l: One system — one version of you
cr5_r: IR index: numerical starting point, not a feeling
cr6_l: You read it and live as before
cr6_r: Three specific tasks — you know what to do next
inc1_d: Deep analysis of your entire architecture
inc2_d: Instruction: how to read and apply without systems knowledge
inc4_d: Method adapted to your personality type
inc5_d: Calendar of focus points for the year
q1: Do I need to know astrology or Human Design?
a1: No. The main text is written in simple human language. All terms are decrypted.
q2: I already have a natal chart. What new will I learn?
a2: You will learn how the chart data is confirmed by the other 5 systems. We give not a description, but the mechanics of your actions.
q3: Why must two systems confirm a conclusion?
a3: To exclude accidents and general descriptions. We look only for those features that are fundamental in you.
q4: How will the report help in my career?
a4: It will show your ideal working conditions: how it's easier for you to make decisions and where your resource for money is.
a5: 3 working days. This is manual analytical work, not automatic text generation.
a6: Child reports, partner compatibility, business compatibility, and astrography calculation.
r1_t: "For the first time, everything was linked into a single system. Finally, not just a description, but mechanics. Clear what to do with it."
r2_t: "It's a completely different feeling — when what you knew inside, you now see outside, in a clear structure."
r7_t: "Very detailed deconstruction across all topics. You become even more established that this is yours and you need to go further."
auth_text: Hi! My name is Elena Derkach. I created AHD Integrator as a system for those who love logic and structure as much as I do. My task is to translate complex systems into the language of real life and effective actions.
n_footer: Needed: date, time, and place of birth
foot_copy: © 2026 Deep Dive Report. All rights reserved.
form_submit: Send data and proceed to payment
